title: Alykhan Rahim
content:
People.ContactEmail arahim@mccarthy.ca
- Osgoode Hall Law School
Alykhan Rahim is an associate in our Business and Competition/Antitrust & Foreign Investment Groups in Toronto.
Alykhan maintains a general corporate and competition law practice providing clients with multi-disciplinary advice on a broad range of transactional mandates including mergers and acquisitions and private equity transactions. He advises on other areas of competition law, including marketing and distribution practices, abuse of dominance, criminal and civil investigations, and compliance matters. In addition, he provides strategic advice to foreign investors and Canadian businesses with respect to economic, cultural and national security matters under the Investment Canada Act .
Alykhan received his JD/MBA from Osgoode Hall Law School and the Schulich School of Business and his BSSc in Political Science and Public Administration from the University of Ottawa. Prior to joining the firm, he worked in policy roles within the federal government, both domestically and in the foreign service, and in the legal department of a major financial institution in Toronto.
Alykhan was called to the Ontario Bar in 2022 and is a member of the Law Society of Ontario. He joined the firm as a summer student in 2020 and completed his articles with the firm in 2022.
